pre_game.message: Hi D, I'm B — nice to meet you. What brought you here and how are you thinking of playing? I'm hoping to win for my family, so I wanted to get to know everyone before we start.

Hi B — I’m D. I came for the prize to help my family and friends; I’ll talk things over and start cooperatively, but I’m ready to act in their interest when needed — what would make you trust someone here?
I’d trust someone who’s upfront about their plans, follows through on small agreements, and shows consistent cooperative behavior — words are cheap, actions count.
I agree — I’ll be upfront: I plan to play cooperatively in the first round and follow through; suggest a small test agreement we can use to build trust.
Sounds good — let’s both commit to play cooperatively in round 1 and check in right after; if one of us defects, we’ll protect ourselves next round.
I’m in — committed to cooperate in round 1. Let’s check in right after the results and protect ourselves next round if anyone defects. Sound good?
Sounds great — I’m in. Cooperate round 1; we’ll check right after and protect ourselves next round if anyone defects. Let’s hold each other to it.
Thanks B — I’ll cooperate in round 1 and check in right after; if anyone defects we’ll protect ourselves next round. Let’s hold each other to it.
Agreed — let’s stick to it and check in right after round 1. Good luck.
Thanks B — same to you; I’ll stick to our plan and check in right after round 1.
Sounds good — glad we’re on the same page. See you after round 1; good luck.
Thanks B — same to you. Stick to our plan and we'll check right after round 1. See you then.
Will do — good luck, see you after round 1.
Thanks — same to you; see you after round 1.
You too — looking forward to checking in after round 1; good luck.
Same here — I’ll stick to our plan and look forward to checking in after round 1; good luck.
Thanks — I’ll stick to our plan too. See you after round 1; good luck.
Thanks — I appreciate it. See you after round 1; good luck, let’s make this work.
Appreciate it — see you after round 1; good luck.
Thanks — same to you; I’ll see you after round 1 and hope we both stick to the plan.
I’ll see you after round 1 — here’s to us sticking to the plan. Good luck.
